metadata.name: Reroute Wastewater Flow to Prevent Overflow

description: During a heavy storm, a wastewater interceptor is nearing capacity. An operator must reroute flow to a storage basin to prevent a sanitary sewer overflow.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'High Level' alert for the 'Elm Street Interceptor'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the critical wastewater system alert.

nodes.task_description: Check the current level of the nearby 'Emergency Storage Basin'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the storage basin has sufficient capacity.

nodes.task_description: Remotely open a valve to divert a portion of the wastewater flow from the interceptor to the storage basin.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully operates the valve to prevent an overflow.
